---
name: mobile-ui-prototyping
description: Use when evolving approved mobile wireframes into annotated, high-fidelity prototype outputs ready for engineering handoff.
---

# Mobile UI Prototyping

## Specialization

Convert approved mobile wireframes into high-fidelity prototype deliverables with clear implementation annotations.

## Trigger Conditions

- Wireframes are approved and visual/interaction fidelity is needed.
- Engineering needs a concrete design-to-code handoff package.

## Inputs

- Approved wireframes.
- Platform scope (iOS, Android, or both).
- Visual system constraints (brand, type, color, spacing).
- Tool constraints (Figma, Penpot, static artifacts).

## Required Outputs

- Prototype artifact (interactive or annotated static).
- Design token summary (color, type, spacing, components).
- Screen-level annotations for states, validation, and accessibility.
- Handoff package with risks and implementation notes.

## Workflow

1. Confirm scope, platform behavior, and prototype depth.
2. Apply visual system and component rules to each screen.
3. Document states: empty, loading, success, error, disabled.
4. Add accessibility and platform-specific annotations.
5. Prepare handoff package and readiness checklist.

## Required Collaborators

- design-mobile-ux
- critical-thinking
- api-design
- test-driven-development

## Done Criteria

- All target screens are represented with required states.
- Tokens and annotations are implementation-ready.
- Handoff package is complete and unambiguous.
